script:
async function getDictText(a,i,t,e,n,o){let s=await e.get(`https://api.dictionaryapi.dev/api/v2/entries/en/${a}`),d=`

[${n("Pronunciations")}]

`+(s.data[0].phonetic?s.data[0].phonetic:"")+"
"+s.data[0].phonetics.filter(a=>a.audio).map(a=>`${a.audio.includes("uk")?"UK":"US"} ${a.text?a.text:""}
`).join("")+s.data[0].meanings.map(a=>`

[${a.partOfSpeech}]

${a.definitions.map((a,i)=>`${i+1}. `+a.definition).join("
")}

`).join("")+`

${n("Learn more")}

`;return window.learnMoreUrl=s.data[0].sourceUrls[0],d}window.getDictText=getDictText;
